title: Application - Update from previous app version while using cloud account (TBD)
scenario: App update from previous version fails or causes issues when using a cloud account in Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the user is logged in with a cloud account.
3. Navigate to the Account screen and verify the current app version.
4. Update the Poly Studio Mobile app to the latest version via the Google Play Store.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app after the update completes.
6. Observe the app behavior and account state after the update.
expected: The app updates successfully. The user remains logged into their cloud account. All account data, device pairings, and settings are preserved after the update.
